title: Build User model
description: Mongoose schema supporting all three roles with role-specific fields.

subtasks.title: Define base schema
subtasks.description: Fields: name, email (unique), phone, passwordHash, role (enum: passenger/driver/admin), createdAt.

subtasks.title: Define driver-specific subfields
subtasks.description: driverDetails: { licenseNumber, organizationName }, isApproved (default false for drivers, true for passengers/admin), status (pending/active/rejected).

subtasks.title: Add password hashing hook
subtasks.description: Pre-save Mongoose middleware to hash password with bcrypt before storing.
